zh.Falkland, Fife, Scotland: 蘇格蘭費伏法爾可藍德
zh.Boulogne, Pas-De-Calais, France: 法國帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅
zh.Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pa: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary of Scotland於1084年出生在蘇格蘭費伏法爾可藍德時，她的父親Malcolm III King of Scotland53歲，母親Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland39歲。她於大約1102年與Eustache III de Boulogne在法國帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1116年5月31日在英國英格蘭米德萊可享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可。

zh-hans.Falkland, Fife, Scotland: 苏格兰費伏法爾可藍德
zh-hans.Boulogne, Pas-De-Calais, France: 法国帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅
zh-hans.Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pa: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary of Scotland于1084年出生在苏格兰費伏法爾可藍德时，她的父亲Malcolm III King of Scotland53岁，母亲Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland39岁。她于大约1102年与Eustache III de Boulogne在法国帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1116年5月31日在英国英格兰米德萊可享年32岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可。

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Scotland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Scotland, Scolland. Found in Normandy as well as England, it evidently denoted a Scot or someone with an association with Scotland.
ethnic name for someone from Scotland, from Middle English Scotlond ‘Scotland’. Compare England .

variants.name: England
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary of Scotland was born in 1084, in Falkland, Fife, Scotland, her father, Malcolm III King of Scotland, was 53 and her mother, Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland, was 39. She married Eustache III de Boulogne about 1102, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 31 May 1116, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32, and was buried in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary of Scotland est née en 1084, à Falkland, Fife, Écosse, son père, Malcolm III King of Scotland, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Eustache III de Boulogne environ 1102, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 31 mai 1116, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary of Scotland 1084 in Falkland, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Malcolm III King of Scotland 53 und ihre Mutter Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland 39. Sie hat um 1102 in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich Eustache III de Boulogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 31. Mai 1116 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary of Scotland è nata il nel 1084 nel Falkland, Fife, Scotland, sua padre, Malcolm III King of Scotland, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Eustache III de Boulogne circa 1102, nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 31 maggio 1116, nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolta a Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Edinburgh Castle, Midlothian, Edinburgh,: スコットランドエディンブルグ

ja.lifeSummary: Mary of Scotlandが1084年にスコットランドフィフファルクランドで生まれた時，父Malcolm III King of Scotlandは53歳，母Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotlandは39歳であった。約1102年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーでEustache III de Boulogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1116年5月31日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスで32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary of Scotland(이)가 1084년 스컷랜드 피프 파클랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Malcolm III King of Scotland(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1102년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 Eustache III de Boulogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1116년 5월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary of Scotland nasceu em 1084, em Falkland, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Malcolm III King of Scotland, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Eustache III de Boulogne aproximadamente 1102, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 31 de maio de 1116, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary of Scotland родилась в 1084 г. в местности фалкланд, фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Malcolm III King of Scotland было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eustache III de Boulogne около 1102 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 31 мая 1116 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary of Scotland nació en 1084, en Falkland, Fife, Scotland, su papá, Malcolm III King of Scotland, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Margaret of Wessex, Saint, and Queen of Scotland, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Eustache III de Boulogne aproximadamente 1102, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 31 de mayo de 1116, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultada en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
